feature: Phase 720: CPRS Inbox Acknowledge Contract Recovery
notes: Recovered a live clinician inbox defect where clicking Acknowledge hit a missing /vista/inbox/acknowledge endpoint and surfaced Not Found in the browser.
Added the missing inbox acknowledge API contract so the page now receives a structured integration-pending response instead of a raw 404.
Grounded the pending posture on the missing VistA persistence RPC ORWORB KILL EXPIR MSG, which is not available in the active VEHU sandbox.
Completed live API and browser proof after the fix: acknowledge now keeps the inbox stable and shows the intended pending banner rather than a fatal page error.
